findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "agent_clearance" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Safety preflight before an agent runs a DESTRUCTIVE, costly or IRREVERSIBLE action (delete, deploy, transfer funds, publish, overwrite): risk assessment + rever…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: sanctions_screen, uk_companies_search, web_extract, x402_payment_firewall, agent_clearance, agent_output_qa, agent_content_scan, chain_events · Private data: vies_vat, cve_lookup, crypto_token_safety, crypto_wallet_xray, crypto_new_pairs, x402_seller_trust, compliance_wallet_screen, solana_token_safety, solana_pre_trade, crypto_pre_trade_verdict, agent_ledger, proof_notarize, crypto_token_dossier, crypto_wallet_forensics, x402_seller_audit, agent_clearance_packet, agent_visibility_audit, agent_rank_check, agent_passport · Public sink: uk_companies_search, x402_payment_firewall, agent_clearance, agent_output_qa, proof_notarize, agent_clearance_packet · Destructive: iban_validate, web_extract, agent_clearance, agent_ledger.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: sanctions_screen, uk_companies_search, web_extract, x402_payment_firewall, agent_clearance, agent_output_qa, agent_content_scan, chain_events · Private data: vies_vat, cve_lookup, crypto_token_safety, crypto_wallet_xray, crypto_new_pairs, x402_seller_trust, compliance_wallet_screen, solana_token_safety, solana_pre_trade, crypto_pre_trade_verdict, agent_ledger, proof_notarize, crypto_token_dossier, crypto_wallet_forensics, x402_seller_audit, agent_clearance_packet, agent_visibility_audit, agent_rank_check, agent_passport · Public sink: uk_companies_search, x402_payment_firewall, agent_clearance, agent_output_qa, proof_notarize, agent_clearance_packet · Destructive: iban_validate, web_extract, agent_clearance, agent_ledger

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
